name: kurye-whatsapp-bot
description: Kolay Gelsin kurye WhatsApp grup botu

scripts.postinstall: node -e "const{execSync}=require('child_process');try{execSync('which chromium-browser || which chromium || which google-chrome',{stdio:'inherit'})}catch(e){console.log('Chrome bulunamadı, puppeteer Chrome kullanılacak')}"
